target: Admin Panel and Vocabulary Image Manager
summary: ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests verifying admin vocabulary API endpoints. Frontend: Admin Dashboard with 6 modules working, Vocabulary Image Manager displays expandable stage/unit/lesson hierarchy with word cards, non-admin users correctly blocked. FIXED: Admin email mismatch bug where frontend accepted admin@ieltsace.com but backend ADMIN_EMAILS list didn't include it.

tests: test_vocabulary_groups_with_valid_admin - PASSED (returns stage/unit/lesson hierarchy with words)
ADMIN_VOCABULARY_GROUPS_API.evidence: GET /api/admin/vocabulary-groups returns vocabulary data grouped by stage/unit/lesson

ADMIN_UPDATE_IMAGE_API.evidence: POST /api/admin/vocabulary/update-image works with URL and file upload

ADMIN_DASHBOARD_UI.evidence: All 6 admin module cards visible with correct icons and descriptions

features: Expandable stage hierarchy (Stage 1: Foundations, Stage 2: Starters)
Unit listing with image progress bars (e.g., 24/24 images)
Word cards with image, word name, definition, checkmark indicator
VOCABULARY_IMAGE_MANAGER_UI.evidence: Screenshots confirm Stage > Unit > Lesson > Word hierarchy working

tests: Non-admin user sees 'Access Denied' message at /admin
Admin dashboard data-testid not visible to non-admin
NON_ADMIN_ACCESS_BLOCKING.evidence: Screenshot shows Access Denied message for regular user

bug_fixed.issue: Admin email mismatch between frontend and backend
bug_fixed.description: Frontend AdminDashboard.js allowed admin@ieltsace.com but backend ADMIN_EMAILS list only had aga.durdy@gmail.com and ieltsace@testmaster.pro. This caused 'Failed to load vocabulary data' error on VocabularyImageManager.
bug_fixed.fix: Added admin@ieltsace.com and stemhousebenluc@gmail.com to ADMIN_EMAILS in server.py line 2738

tests: Admin Dashboard at /admin renders with 6 module cards
All admin module test-ids present (users, vocab-images, feedback, credits, content, visual-gen)
Vocabulary Image Manager loads vocabulary groups
Non-admin user blocked with Access Denied

critical_code_review_comments: ADMIN_EMAILS in server.py now includes all emails that frontend checks: aga.durdy@gmail.com, ieltsace@testmaster.pro, admin@ieltsace.com, stemhousebenluc@gmail.com
Frontend AdminDashboard.js admin check uses email.includes('aga.durdy') OR exact email match - this is correctly replicated in backend is_admin_email() function
VocabularyImageManager uses user.email from context to call API with admin_email query param
All admin API endpoints correctly return 403 for non-admin users
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing unified learning content (stages, units, lessons with vocabulary).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 verified Admin Panel and Vocabulary Image Manager features. Backend admin vocabulary endpoints working with correct 403/404 responses. Frontend displays expandable hierarchy. Fixed ADMIN_EMAILS mismatch bug. Admin emails: aga.durdy@gmail.com, admin@ieltsace.com, stemhousebenluc@gmail.com.

mocked_api.note: All admin APIs use real MongoDB queries to unified_stages, unified_units, unified_lessons collections
